The '''Hetrinar assault bomber''' was a starfighter used by the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]].

Hetrinar assault bombers flew alongside [[Miy'til starfighter]]s aboard [[Nova-class battle cruiser|''Nova''-class battle cruisers]] for "defensive purposes".

{{Ship-stub}}
